title: QC Laboratory Supervisor (MNC I Wet Chemistry I Manual Testing)
description:
• MNC Company
  • Basic $4000 - $6000 + AWS + VB + Excellent Benefits
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working days: Monday to Friday
  • Working hours: 8am to 4.30pm
  • Jurong Island. Company Transport provided

Job Responsibilities:

  • Coordinate the day-to-day activities of a team of Laboratory Assistants who check, test, and inspect raw material, goods in process and finished products
  • Prioritize and assign tasks to ensure that team’s resources are used effectively, and that work schedules and targets are met
  • Assists QC Manager in classification of final product and reworked lots
  • Responsible for troubleshooting and investigating quality issues, implement improvement from Analysis gap study
  • Monitor in-process samples, liaison with production teams for preventive & corrective actions
  • Prepare activity and progression reports so recurring problems, either with the quality of the product or the reliability of testing procedures, can be identified and addressed
  • Monitor the performance of staff, equipment and laboratory processes to ensure quality control system effectiveness and efficiency
  • Preparation of quality and budget reports and updates
  • Training of all lab assistants and shift technicians assigned to laboratory work
  • Supervise and coach team members
  • Supports QC department functions onsite and off-site as necessary
  • Other ad-hoc duties as assigned

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Chemical related field
  • Minimum 5 years’ hands-on experience in Laboratory Testing (Wet Chemistry) and supervisory experiences
  • Good understanding of laboratory equipment such as GC, AAS, Auto-titrator, NIR etc.
  • Experienced in handling subordinate's performance appraisal

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


THIEN CHING MEI (R2198032)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
